self_defect_prompt: Find any card, panel, or button that uses both a 1px solid border and a soft wide shadow. If the shadow blur is 16px or more on the same element, flag it as a ghost-card border-plus-shadow tell.
deterministic_check: Detect any single element with border: 1px solid and a box-shadow blur radius of 16px or more.

self_defect_prompt: Find cards, sections, panels, and text inputs with border-radius values of 24px or more. Treat pill tags and buttons separately; flag large containers that look inflated rather than designed.
deterministic_check: Detect border-radius values of 24px or more on cards, sections, panels, or text inputs.

self_defect_prompt: Find hand-drawn or doodle-style SVGs that stand in for a real subject. Flag sketch or doodle class names, turbulence or displacement filters, and crude low-path scenes used as trust-building visuals.
deterministic_check: Detect SVGs with sketch or doodle class names, feTurbulence or feDisplacementMap grain filters, or crude low-path scene illustrations.

self_defect_prompt: Find decorative diagonal stripe backgrounds on the body or top-level sections. If repeating-linear-gradient is used as surface decoration rather than information, flag the Codex stripe tell.
deterministic_check: Detect repeating-linear-gradient used as a section or body background.

self_defect_prompt: Find display or hero headings with letter-spacing tighter than -0.04em. Flag cramped tracking, especially when letters touch or the heading loses legibility.
deterministic_check: Detect letter-spacing values tighter than -0.04em on display or hero headings.

self_defect_prompt: Find hover states that transform an image itself, including parent-hover utilities that scale, rotate, or translate a child image. Flag it when the image is not the action target.
deterministic_check: Detect :hover transforms on img elements or parent-hover patterns that animate a child image.

self_defect_prompt: Find warm-neutral near-white body or page backgrounds, including tokens named paper, cream, sand, bone, linen, or ivory when used as the page background. Flag the generic warm-paper default unless the brief truly requires it.
deterministic_check: Detect a body or page background in the light warm-neutral band, or warm-paper token names used as the page background.

self_defect_prompt: Find tiny uppercase tracked labels repeated above three or more section headings. Include the numbered 01/02/03 variant when the page is not a real ordered sequence.
deterministic_check: Detect a small uppercase tracked label repeated above three or more section headings, including numbered markers used as universal section kickers.

self_defect_prompt: Find one identical scroll reveal applied to most or all top-level sections: same fade, rise distance, easing, and trigger. Flag uniform reveal reflexes that ignore the content being revealed.
deterministic_check: Detect the same scroll-triggered fade-and-rise animation applied uniformly to most or all top-level sections.
